name: python3-graphviz
title: python3-graphviz
description:
Simple Python 3 interface for Graphviz
This package facilitates the creation and rendering of graph descriptions in
the DOT language of the Graphviz graph drawing software from Python.
.
Create a graph object, assemble the graph by adding nodes and edges, and
retrieve its DOT source code string. Save the source code to a file and render
it with the Graphviz installation of your system.
.
Use the ``view`` option/method to directly inspect the resulting (PDF, PNG,
SVG, etc.) file with its default application. Graphs can also be rendered
and displayed within Jupyter notebooks.
.
This contains the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-graphviz because Simple Python 3 interface for Graphviz.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-graphviz as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-graphviz with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-graphviz --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
